verified_facts.statement: The transparent PE film and top yellow masking tape are permanently connected as one product.
Correct installation presses and secures the yellow tape before pulling the film down.
The transparent film can cover countertops, tile, furniture, and other renovation surfaces.
After the far edge is fixed and the film is tensioned, the film can be torn by hand without scissors.
During painting or sanding, paint and dust collect on the exposed film surface.
The product is removed from the tape edge with the dirty film and is intended not to damage the furniture finish or leave adhesive residue.
Removing the contaminated film reduces the cleanup work after the job.

visual_invariants: yellow tape and transparent film remain connected
yellow tape is pressed before the film is pulled
the same professional painter and workwear remain recognizable
